description.ko: 보랏빛 성운 사이에서 블랙홀의 중력에 이끌리는 무한한 우주 공간의 장엄한 풍경을 담았습니다.
description.en: A majestic view of the infinite cosmic void, capturing the gravitational pull of a black hole amidst violet nebulae.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Event Horizon’s Embrace.' A massive swirling vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter pulling gossamer-thin #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils into a gravitational singularity. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters flicker through thick cosmic dust. Gravitational lensing effects warp the starlight at the edges. Atmosphere of infinite scale and silent majesty, hyper-realistic space photography aesthetic, volumetric lighting.
